Caption: Simulated vs observed U.S. unemployment rate, 2018-01 to 2026-02, with pre-COVID stable / COVID crisis / post-COVID normalization regimes shaded. ABM curve is the 5-seed mean of the recalibrated V_Full.
Main Message: Visualizes the regime-specific quality of fit; post-COVID alignment is tight, COVID spike is under-predicted, pre-COVID is over-predicted.

Caption: UR RMSE (pp) bar chart by regime: post-COVID normalization, COVID crisis (Mar 2020 on), pre-COVID stable, full post-2018. Error bars = ±1 seed s.d. across 5 seeds.
Main Message: Post-COVID is the regime of strongest fit (0.221 pp); model is not designed as a crisis forecaster.

Caption: Time series of simulated minus observed UR (pp) over the full evaluation window, with regime annotations.
Main Message: Sign and magnitude of regime-specific bias visible.

Caption: LFPR and EPOP RMSE (pp) bar chart by regime.
Main Message: Tier-2 targets are not the model's strength post-COVID.

Caption: Post-COVID UR RMSE (pp) for the four separately re-calibrated variants: V_Full, V_LaborOnly, V_Homogeneous, V_Simplified. Error bars = ±1 s.d. across 5 final seeds.
Main Message: Full strictly best after recalibration; gap is moderate (0.288 pp vs Simplified).

Caption: Waterfall decomposition: Simplified RMSE → +mechanism (to Homogeneous) → +household (to LaborOnly) → +heterogeneity (to Full).
Main Message: Within-experiment accounting: heterogeneity share 94.2% of the small 0.288 pp total gain (not causal).

Caption: UR trajectories of the four variants vs observed UR over the post-COVID window.
UR RMSE heatmap: regime × variant.
Main Message: Full is not best in every regime.

Caption: Top-5 LHS-candidate × 5-seed dispersion box plot per variant.
Main Message: V_Full seed s.d. 0.023 pp; magnitude of ABM-vs-no-change lead lies within this band.

Caption: Post-COVID UR RMSE for V_Full and six re-calibrated ablation variants: No-Search, No-Liquidity, No-Housing, No-SLH, No-Consumption, Search-Only.
Main Message: Only No-Search shows a large standalone degradation (+0.812 pp); other dimensions largely close after recalibration.

Caption: Old raw delta vs new re-calibrated delta per ablation dimension.
Main Message: Recalibration largely closes the Liq/Hous gaps; Search gap is robust.

Caption: Regime × ablation UR RMSE heatmap.
V_Full vs V_NoSearch UR trajectory.
Main Message: Search Friction is structurally hard to substitute even after recalibration.

Caption: LFPR vs EPOP RMSE trade-off across ablation variants.
Main Message: Removing household block improves LFPR/EPOP fit but hurts UR fit.

Caption: Heterogeneity ladder marginal-gain curve (Core L0..L6 + Layer G2,G3).
Main Message: Marginal gain plateaus after the labor-search dimension is added.

Caption: Post-COVID UR RMSE for ABM and 11 dynamic-protocol benchmarks (no-change, hist mean, drift, AR, ARIMA, ETS, VAR, Ridge VAR, Beveridge, DMP, flow).
Main Message: ABM rank 1 at 0.273 pp; no-change/ETS tied at 0.309 pp (Δ=0.036 pp within seed s.d.).

Caption: RMSE ratio of each benchmark vs the recalibrated ABM.
Main Message: Quantifies the modesty of the lead over the strongest competitors.

Caption: Scatter of model RMSE on post-COVID window (dynamic vs reference).
Model × regime UR RMSE heatmap (12 × 4).
Main Message: ABM is not rank 1 in every regime.

Caption: Benchmark and ABM trajectories on the post-COVID window.
4-panel dashboard: (A) regime UR RMSE; (B) controls + ablation; (C) benchmark race; (D) legacy invariants (seed/init/horizon/N/method).
Main Message: Single-figure summary of within-regime robustness and the regime-asymmetry caveat.

Caption: OOS RMSE per training-window split × model (10 splits).
Main Message: Ranking and OOS RMSE band stable to train-window choice.

Caption: Log-log forecast horizon RMSE curves with slopes for ABM and 7 benchmarks.
Main Message: ABM slope -0.092 is the shallowest among the 8 models.

Caption: UR RMSE vs N curves for 4 models × 10 seeds × 2 modes (subsample / regenerate).
Main Message: Plateau at N>=50k; default N=100,000 past plateau.

Caption: Best-test UR RMSE per calibration method (RS/LHS/Sobol/CtF/DE).
Main Message: Range 0.214–0.243 pp; predictions method-invariant.

Caption: Per-parameter top-5 coefficient-of-variation heatmap across 5 calibration methods.
Main Message: 10/14 parameters have CV >= 0.40 (weakly identified).
